name: tla_forall_always_equality_intensional_bridge

name: spec_entails_tla_forall_closure_bridge
reason: spec_entails_tla_forall is external_body combining pointwise entailments into entailment of tla_forall — requires resolving that tla_forall's TempPred::new closure-wrapped forall evaluates consistently with individual a_to_p(a) results

name: spec_entails_always_tla_forall_bridge
reason: spec_entails_always_tla_forall chains both external_body axioms — commuting always inside tla_forall relies on intensional equality of tla_forall(always∘p) with always(tla_forall(p)) plus closure bridge for forall introduction

name: tla_forall_always_swap_any_pred

name: false_spec_entails_always_tla_forall
